title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HP India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HP India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HP India Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India Advisory Limited:
HP India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India Advisory Limited!
